roadmap: FINAL-PR-06 Operational Seed Spine + Role Profiles + Seed-to-Work-Capsule Compiler
FINAL-PR-07 DFAS Field Selection + Coherence / Review Axes + Route Scoring
FINAL-PR-08 Projection Spine + Expression Packet + Shadow Candidate Graph

handoff_first_extension_v2.definition: Handoff-First is mandatory and absorbed into the existing five final PRs.

handoff_first_mandates: Y and Mjölnir profiles are mandatory as structured profile contracts, not runtime claims.
more_than_five_justification: Release / Closure shifts to FINAL-PR-09 so operational seed, field selection, and projection spines can land as bounded deterministic PRs before full acceptance.

qirc_roadmap_statement: QIRC Core is mandatory for 100%. Browser bridge, SDK/App event mapping, File/Spool, CLI/Agent Pipe, Trace/Receipt mapping, and Dev Mode event viewer are mandatory for the final Local Runtime Hub target. Feed/thread/discovery/pubsub/federation rings are optional/deferred.
